title: Welcome, Generator
description: A short, personalized welcome the moment your type is identified as Generator. Sacral as compass. Response as strategy.
learningGoal: A newly identified Generator immediately understands their core operating principle — response over initiation, sacral as the compass — and feels recognized.
keyPoints: You are designed to respond, not to initiate
Your sacral center is the compass — gut-level yes or no
Satisfaction is your signature; frustration is the signal something is misaligned
Your energy is renewable when you use it for the right things
forbiddenClaims: you must follow every gut response
toneNotes: Warm and recognition-based. Speak directly to the Generator. The video should feel like meeting someone who already understands you.
narration_script:
You are a Generator.

The most common design on the planet. Roughly thirty-five percent of all people share your structural type. The sacral motor in the center of your chart is the renewable engine of the species.

You are designed to respond. Not to initiate.

This is not a limitation. It is the mechanics of how your energy actually works. When you push, when you force, when you start something from nothing just because the mind decided to, you burn through your reserves and meet resistance.

When you respond — when life puts something in front of you and your gut answers before the mind gets involved — your energy renews itself. You can work for hours. The satisfaction lands at the end of the day. Sleep is deep.

The sacral is your compass. A gut-level yes. A gut-level no. Trust it before you negotiate with it.

Satisfaction is your signature. When you feel it, you are aligned. When frustration shows up instead, something is misaligned. The frustration is the signal, not the problem.

This is your design. Renewable, responsive, deeply satisfied when used the way it was built.

Welcome to your blueprint.
